title: Chris Smith (rugby league, born 1975)
extract: Chris Smith (born 31 October 1975) is a former Wales international rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for Wales also represented GB in the Gatorade superleague 9's played in Townsville 1997, and at club level for Redhill ARLFC (Castleford), Castleford, St. Helens, Hull FC and York City Knights, primarily as a wing.
